notes: Page exists but covers supplements to enhance aerobic performance — not the health benefits of aerobic exercise itself
2006 letter in Primary Care Companion to J Clin Psychiatry; confirms aerobic exercise reduces anxiety/depression; very limited scope (mental health only, single letter not a primary study)
2024 overview of 26 meta-analyses (20.9M observations, 199 cohort studies); high CRF vs low CRF: HR=0.47 (53% lower all-cause mortality); per 1-MET increase: 11-17% mortality reduction
2019 meta-analysis, Physical Activity all-cause and CVD mortality; dose-response relationship for aerobic physical activity and mortality outcomes
